intro_sentences.en: Let's study the simple future of to see.
intro_sentences.pt-BR: Vamos estudar o futuro simples de ver.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar el futuro simple de ver.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions le futur simple de voir.

sample_sentences.en: The verb to see is common in daily conversation.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O verbo ver é comum na conversa do dia a dia.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El verbo ver es común en la conversación cotidiana.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le verbe voir est courant dans la conversation quotidienne.

sample_sentences.en: I will see my family this weekend.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eu verei minha família neste fim de semana.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Yo veré a mi familia este fin de semana.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Je verrai ma famille ce week-end.

sample_sentences.en: You will see the difference soon.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Você verá a diferença em breve.

sample_sentences.en: He will see the doctor tomorrow.
She will see the message later.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ela verá a mensagem mais tarde.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ella verá el mensaje más tarde.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle verra le message plus tard.

sample_sentences.en: It will see a lot of use.

sample_sentences.fr-FR: Nous verrons ce qui se passe.

sample_sentences.en: You all will see the results next month.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Vocês verão os resultados no próximo mês.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ustedes verán los resultados el próximo mes.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Vous verrez les résultats le mois prochain.

sample_sentences.en: They will see the city tomorrow.
